'''Vulp Major''' was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] in the [[Vulpter system/Legends|Vulpter system]] of the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]]. The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] had nine [[Moon/Legends|moons]] and occupied the sixth [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position around the [[Vulpter (star)|Vulpter]] [[Star/Legends|star]].<ref name="Wizards" />

==Behind the scenes==
Vulp Major was mentioned in "[[Byss and the Deep Core]], Part 4: Vulpter," the fourth installment in the [[Planet Hoppers]] ''[[Byss and the Deep Core]]'' article series, written by [[Rodney Thompson]] and published on [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s [[Wizards.com|website]] on [[April 28]], [[2005]].<ref name="Wizards" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Vulpter [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Vulp Major, in grid square L-10.<ref name="TEA" />
